LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CHUN TAM; AMENDED MOTION TO QUIET TITLE AND FOR INJUNCTIVE RELIEF. APPEARANCE: PLAINTIFF. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING-MOTION TO QUIET TITLE IS DENIED: ISSUE TO BE RAISED AT TRIAL. MOTION FOR INJUNCTION IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MAY TRANSPORT CONSTRUCTION MATERIALS AND TOOL THROUGH THE GATE FROM 10:00 A.M. THROUGH 5:00 P.M. DAILY. PLAINTIFF IS TO POST A BOND OF $500 PER CCP 529. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HON.DONALD S. MITCHELL. REPORTER: RHONDA FUNG, CSR #4819

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CHUN TAM NTC OF HRG RE CONTEMPT CONTINUED FROM OCT-29-2004 TO LAW AND MOTION AT NOV-22-2004, 9:30 AM IN DEPT.302. APPEARANCES: FOR DEFENDANT AND FOR PLAINTIFF. ARGUED AND THE COURT ISSUED AN ORDER OF BODY ATTACHMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT MR. WENG CHIO U, FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY THE ORDER TO APPEAR IN COURT. HE HAS TO POST BOND OF $1,500.00. BUT, STAYED UP NOV. 22, 2004 AT 10;30AM. IF DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR AGAIN ON THE SAID DATE, THE COURT WILL ISSUE TWO VIOLATIONS OF CONTEMPT,HENCE,A ISSUE WARRANT OF ARREST WILL BE ISSUED BY THEN. LAW ND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CHUN TAM RE: CONTEMPT HEARING - THE COURT FINDS WENG CHIO U IN CONTEMPT OF COURT FOR VIOLATING AND IGNORING THE PERMANENT INJUNCTION ISSUED BY THE COURT ON NOVEMBER 30, 2004. THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 WAS STAYED AND TO BE REMITTED TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 1, 2005. THE COURT ALSO ALLOWED ATTY'S FEE TO BE PAID BY MR. WENG CHIO U. ATTY. WONG TO FILE MEMORANDUM OF COST AND TO PREPARE AN ORDER WITH THE AMOUNT OF ATTY. FEES TE BE DETERMINED BY THE COURT. COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER FROM NOV-18-2005 TO JAN-04-2006, 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 , TO MONITOR EVENTS OCCURING FROM TODAY'S HEARING UNTIL AND UP TO JANUARY 4, 2006. THE COURT WILL ALSO EXECUTE THE ORDER AS TO REASONABLE ATTY'S FEE AND THE DATE IT NEED'S TO BE PAID BY MR. U. (302/REQ/HE) HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
